form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Gunnedah (31.33) in a Grade 5, finishing a 15 length sixth. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Gunnedah (31.33) in a Grade 5, finishing a 15 length sixth. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5 lengths in 22.49, beating Cobblestone Road. Last start finished 7th on April 13 over 450m at this track behind Magic Fletch beaten 9 lengths (25.56) in a Grade 5. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5 lengths in 22.49, beating Cobblestone Road. Last start finished 7th on April 13 over 450m at this track behind Magic Fletch beaten 9 lengths (25.56) in a Grade 5. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.69) at Bulli in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (19.69) at Bulli in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Leading player.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 400m (22.60) beating Savvy Lad in Grade 5 on April 6. Hard to tip with any confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 400m (22.60) beating Savvy Lad in Grade 5 on April 6. Hard to tip with any confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in four tries. Last start 4th over 340m at Bulli. Others read better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in four tries. Last start 4th over 340m at Bulli. Others read better.

form.formComment: Last run was an ordinary eighth over 324m at Richmond Straight following a win two back at The Gardens. Not keen, needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last run was an ordinary eighth over 324m at Richmond Straight following a win two back at The Gardens. Not keen, needs to lift.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (29.62) at Bulli in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from nine starts. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (29.62) at Bulli in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from nine starts. Expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length third (22.62) over 400m at this track. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.
